description: Structured manufacturer reference data for tone normalization and cross-line translation. Import via hair_color_db/tools/import_reference_pack.py

directories.aveda: Pure tones, shade inventory, precoloration formulas, NRP, line rules
directories.redken: Shade inventory (SEQ + Gels), color melting pairing, technology key
directories.loreal: Dia Light / Dia Richesse shade inventories + JSON
directories.moroccanoil: Shade inventory with tonal families, color manual
directories.schwarzkopf: IGORA ROYAL normalized shades, formula recreation rules

import_targets.J_cross_line_conversion_map.json: explicit source→target rules from pairing + tone families
